props.title: New Article: When Did the Crowd Break? MiroShark Now Tells You the Exact Round.

props.text: MiroShark's peak-round belief analytics (PR #108) completes an analytical stack that turns simulation output into machine-readable instrumentation — inflection points, confidence scores, prediction market calibration, and trading signals. Combined with a 1,445% Gartner surge in multi-agent inquiries and five community contributors in seven days, the simulation-as-instrument thesis is no longer theoretical.

props.title: When Did the Crowd Break? MiroShark Now Tells You the Exact Round.
